scenarios.label: Payment — small P2P
scenarios.description: NaC simulator: +999… MSISDNs. SIM swap only when no consent/location.

scenarios.label: Payment — with consent reference
scenarios.description: Calls Consent Info first, then SIM swap (+ payment ladder).

scenarios.label: Payment — high value
scenarios.description: Ladder: SIM swap, verify, device, device swap, recycling (up to 5 NaC calls).

scenarios.label: Payment — location verification
scenarios.description: NaC Location Verification (circle) at Accra + SIM swap ladder.

scenarios.label: Onboarding — standard
scenarios.description: SIM swap, device swap, recycling, device status

scenarios.label: Onboarding — with claimed identity
scenarios.description: Adds number verification; use simulator MSISDN

scenarios.label: Mobility — with reference location
scenarios.description: Fetches network location (vs geofence subscription if you pass geofence_subscription_id)

scenarios.label: Mobility — geofence subscription
scenarios.description: Replace reachability/location with Geofencing GET (use a real subscription id from NaC console when available).
